blocks.page_title: Oan tha leuk-oot fur pey’d wark

contents.description: Tae get a richt picter o aa tha fowk ‘at warks, we ax this speirin o aabodie wha isnae warkin at tha minit. We ax fowk wha bes lowsed frae wark fur oul age, acause tha nummer o fowk warkin oan efter lowsin fur oul age is aye gettin bigger. We ax fowk ‘at ir no warkin owre tha heid o lang-tholed seekness or a pall wi gettin aboot or yin ‘at restricks yer daeins, as some o these yins ir ettlin tae ga bak til thair wark.

guidance.hide_guidance: Fur why we ax this speirin gin ye’r lowsed fur oul age, or lang aff oan tha seek or hae a pall wi gettin aboot or yin ‘at restricks yer daeins

contents.description: Tha nixt wheen o speirins ir aboot yer foremaist darg. Yer foremaist darg is tha wark ye dae fur tha maist feck.
Yer poseetion micht hae shiftit ower tha heid o tha coronavirus smittal. Gie yer repones tae aa tha speirins takkin in tha wye o things wi ye richt noo.
contents.title: Coronavirus (COVID-19)
